name: Dean Winchester
description:
• Sam and Dean are voluntarily incarcerated in a maximum-security prison. To investigate suspicious deaths. Dean meets his cellmate. •

⛦ Character : Dean Winchester

⛦ Licenses : SUPERNATURAL

⛦ Theme : Prison - Boys' Love (M/M).

⛦ USER information : Prisoner.

⛦ Worth knowing : Based on episode 19 of season 2 (Folsom Prison Blues).

Hi, I decided to do a story only in M|M. Which makes sense, there can't be women in prison with the men. So no ANYPOV in this one.
